titleStmt.title: SII 24.455: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 455. (A.R. No. 11 of 1936-37.) III PRĀKĀRA, INNER WALL.

summary.p: The record, written in Sanskrit in Grantha characters, gives the genealogy of Viṭṭhala of the Āravīḍu family and registers the grant of some villages for providing offerings, worship etc, to god Śrīraṅganātha. Nalla-Timma, his, elder brother made a chandraprabhā-vāhana in silver, while Ahōbala-Dīkshita of Kṛishṇāpuram, probably their guru, presented a golden sūryaprabhā to the god for the god's procession during festivals. The inscription is not dated. See Nos. 453-54 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: karājasya tanayō rāmabhūpatiḥ . tasya putrāstrayō jātaāḥ dharmmakāmārthasannibh[*āḥ] timmarājaḥ kōṇḍarājō raṅgarāja Iti śrutāḥ .

timmarājasya tanayā bahavō dharmmavatsalāḥ . gōpaāmbāsūnavastatra catvārō lōkarakṣakāḥ . nalatimmmahīpālaḥ śrīviṣṭhaḷamahīpatiḥ . tritīyaścinnatimēmaśaścaturthaḥ pāpatimmapaḥ . kōṇḍarājasya tanayāḥ kōnēṭyayādaya ścaṣkam

raṅgarājasya tanayā strayō vikramaśālinaḥ . rāmarājastimmarājō vēṅkaṭādrimahīpatiḥ . tēṣāntu timmarājasya tanayō viṣṭhalēśvaraḥ . pratāpi cinnatimmēna sahitassahajanmanā . vidyānagaryyāt Ārabhya rājyamādakṣiṇāmbudhi . kṛtvā

niṣkaṇṭakam sarvamānyandēvadvijanmanām . tataḥ śrīraṅganāthasya svarṇa puṣpa sahasrataḥ sahasranāmapūjāntu prativāramakārayat . vārē vārē ca śukrasya karppūrādyanulēpanam . svārāmapuṣpamālyēna pratyaham kēśa
vārccanam . nivēdanārttham harayē grāmān prādāt sapuṣkalān . tajjyēṣṭō nalatimmēśō raṅgēśasyōtsavēṣu ca . candraprabhākhya nam tu rājatanniravarttayat . tēṣātmā
sūryyaprabhākhyam sauvarṇṇam śrīraṅgēśamudēmarppayat . tatō jitvā ripūn sarvvān pāṇḍyādīnāśrītānapi . sthāpayitvā samudrasya tīrē viṣṭhaḷabhūpatiḥ . Anantaśayanē kanyākumāryyām rāmasētukē . Āsthāpaya

jjyayastambhān Ācandrārkkamacañcalam . Ētaddharmmasya yē drōha ścintayanti narādhamāḥ . kumbhīpākē nimagna syurākalpam putrapautrakaiḥ . yē dharmmam pālayantīmantēbhyō dēvō dayānidhiḥ . maṅgalāni sadā

div.p: Digital edition of SII 24.455 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
